file_summary: This file contains test classes for TimedSerializer and TimestampSigner from the itsdangerous library. It includes tests for time-based signature validation, handling of expired signatures, malformed timestamps, and edge cases with future timestamps. The tests use pytest fixtures and freezegun for time manipulation.

line_windows.summary: This window covers the entire import section, the FreezeMixin class, and the TestTimestampSigner class up to the end of its test methods. It includes: imports of datetime utilities, pytest, freezegun, and itsdangerous modules; the FreezeMixin providing time-freezing fixtures; and TestTimestampSigner with tests for max_age validation, timestamp extraction, and error handling for missing/malformed timestamps.

This window covers the latter part of TestTimestampSigner and the complete TestTimedSerializer class. It includes: tests for future timestamps and signature error handling in TestTimestampSigner; the TestTimedSerializer class definition with its serializer_factory fixture; and tests for max_age and return_timestamp functionality in TimedSerializer.
